markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress and define the Agentic Commerce strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Calendar:** The content calendar is live, organized by cluster and vertical. Talon.One will now assign priorities (High/Low) to guide production.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [**Agentic Commerce Strategy:** The goal is to own the niche of "Agentic Commerce for Loyalty & Promotions." This requires a coordinated effort, with Talon.One creating deep-expertise content and GrowthX building a supportive content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [**Production Pipeline:** GrowthX's AI pipeline uses "agentic" workflows that self-evaluate and iterate to ensure quality, with human editors performing three distinct quality checks.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**Content Optimization:** The strategy is to optimize existing content first, as it's faster and more effective than creating new articles. Sunsetting old posts is a last resort for unfixable issues like poor URL slugs.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)

## Topics

### Agentic Commerce Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Establish Talon.One as the category leader for "Agentic Commerce for Loyalty & Promotions."](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [**Challenge:** The broad "Agentic Commerce" keyword is highly competitive (SEMrush difficulty: 70), with major players like OpenAI and Salesforce.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [**Solution:** Focus on a specific niche.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
      - [**Talon.One:** Create deep-expertise content (e.g., reports) that leverages proprietary data and internal knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Build a supportive content cluster (e.g., "Agentic Commerce for Retail") to drive traffic and interlink with Talon.One's core pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
      - [**Coordination:** The teams will align efforts to build authority and interlink all content for maximum SEO impact.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)

### Content Calendar & Production

  - [**New Calendar:** The content calendar is live, organized by cluster and industry vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** Talon.One will assign priorities (High/Low) to topics, starting with composable commerce as a low priority.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**Calendar View:** A traditional calendar view is not currently available.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [**Why:** The team is still establishing a production rhythm (review times, CMS publishing) and is focused on selecting topics for the initial 5 articles/week sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [**Future:** A calendar view is planned for Phase 2 to help the GTM team coordinate campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

### GrowthX Production Pipeline

  - [**Process:** Talon.One feedback → Updates to "artifacts" (writing guidelines, case studies) → Dynamic insertion into AI pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Agentic Workflows:** Custom pipelines for articles, comparisons, and case studies use self-evaluating agents.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [**Function:** Agents iterate on tasks (e.g., research) until a quality score is met, ensuring reliable sourcing and structure.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [**Human Oversight:** Three distinct human quality checks are performed by a managing editor:](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
    1.  [Initial structure review](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
    2.  [Mid-production quality check](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
    3.  [Final editorial pass](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

### Content Optimization & Interlinking

  - [**Optimization Strategy:** Prioritize optimizing existing content over creating new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Faster results. Sunsetting old posts is a last resort for unfixable issues like poor URL slugs, requiring a 301 redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [**Interlinking Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [**New Content:** An automated agent scans the sitemap to find relevant internal linking opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [**Old Content:** A manual process, managed by GrowthX, will be used to add links from older articles to new content.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Reza:**](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [Assign priorities (High/Low) to topics in the content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [Share topics and details for the Agentic Commerce content Talon.One is producing.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Provide the GEO data benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Research search intent and competition for the "Agentic Commerce for Loyalty & Promotions" niche.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [**Talon.One & GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
      - [Coordinate on a unified strategy and content plan for the Agentic Commerce niche.](https://fathom.video/share/tDKsFDqKwvkM9H7sao3CwH9vPE8HhfUV?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
